ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Reker 55% (reker (Litopenaeus vannamei), stabilisator (e451, e452)), panering 45 % [brødsmuler (hvetemel, vann, gjær, salt, dekstrose), rapsolje, røre (maismel, vann, rismel, glukose), paneringsmiks (eggehvitepulver, bakepulver (hevemiddel (e450, e500), hvetemel))]
